# ai-tools / whip

Whip is a task orchestrator for AI agent work. It lives inside the ai-tools repository and works alongside claude-irc, redit, vaultkey, webform, and vaultkey-action.

Primary pages:
- https://whip.bang9.dev/ : product landing page for whip
- https://whip.bang9.dev/tools : catalog of the tools shipped in ai-tools
- https://whip.bang9.dev/how-it-works : scroll-driven workflow story from the operator point of view

Key concepts:
- global: default execution mode for a single task
- workspace: named execution mode for stacked task lanes
- claude-irc: shared messaging bus for agents and leads

Repository:
- https://github.com/bang9/ai-tools
